2.label: On/Off (Button)
2.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off when the relay status is changed using the B-button.

3.label: On/Off (Power)
3.description: Devices in this group will be switched on or off depending on the current load of the plugged device.

paramInformation.label: 'Always On' Mode
paramInformation.description: When active, the Wall Plug keeps the connected device permanently on and stops reacting to attempts to turn it off.

paramInformation.label: High Priority Power Report
paramInformation.description: Minimum percentage change in active power that results in sending a power report with the highest priority

paramInformation.label: Standard Power Report
paramInformation.description: Minimum percentage change in active power that results in sending a power report

paramInformation.label: Power Reporting Interval
paramInformation.description: Time interval of sending at most 5 standard power reports when the power changes by the value set in parameter 11

paramInformation.label: Energy Reporting Threshold
paramInformation.description: Minimum change in energy consumption that results in sending a new report

paramInformation.label: Power and Energy Periodic Reports
paramInformation.description: Time period between independent reports sent when changes in power load have not been recorded

paramInformation.label: Control of On/Off (Button) Association Group Devices

options.label: Control opposite to the wall plug

paramInformation.label: DOWN Value
paramInformation.description: Lower power threshold, used in parameter 23. Cannot be higher than parameter 22.

paramInformation.label: UP Value
paramInformation.description: Upper power threshold, used in parameter 23. Cannot be lower than parameter 21.

paramInformation.label: Response After Exceeding Defined Power Values
paramInformation.description: Defines the way that 3rd association group devices are controlled

options.label: Turn associated devices on when power drops below the lower threshold
Turn associated devices off when power drops below the lower threshold
Turn associated devices on when power rises above the upper threshold
Turn associated devices off when power rises above the upper threshold

paramInformation.label: SWITCH ON Value for On/Off Association Groups
paramInformation.description: The value of the BASIC SET command frame sent to devices in the On/Off association groups (2, 3)
Values 5-50 cyclically change the device state with the set period (0.5-5.0s, step 0.1s). Ignored when the 'Always On' mode is active.

paramInformation.label: Power Load for Violet Color
paramInformation.description: Active only when parameter 41 is set to 1 or 2.

paramInformation.label: LED Ring Color When Device Is On

options.label: Color changes continuously depending on power
Color changes in steps depending on power

paramInformation.label: LED Ring Color When Device Is Off
LED Ring Color At Z-Wave Alarm Detection

metadata.inclusion: Quickly triple click the B-button located on the Plug's casing.
metadata.exclusion: Quickly triple click the B-button located on the Plug's casing.
metadata.reset:
1. Insert the Plug into a socket.
2. Press and hold the B-button until the LED ring glows yellow.
3. Release the B-button.
4. Click the B-button once to confirm the selection.
